title: Bridge Essay: Mindfulness-induced endogenous theta stimulation occasions self-transcendence an

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Liberation and enlightenment — ego dissolution, self-transcendence, psychedelic-induced mystical experience, spiritual awakening, enlightenment neuroscience.

**Mindfulness-induced endogenous theta stimulation occasions self-transcendence and inhibits addictive behavior.** — Sci Adv. PMID: 36223472. DOI: 10.1126/sciadv.abo4455. Self-regulation is instantiated by theta oscillations (4 to 8 Hz) in neurons of frontal midline brain regions. Frontal midline theta (FMΘ) is inversely associated with default mode network (DMN) activation, which subserves self-referential processing. Addiction involves impaired self-regulation and DMN dysfunction. Mindfulness is an efficacious self-regulatory practice for treating addiction, but little is known about the mechanisms by which mindfulness reduces addictive behavior. In this mechan...
